name: llm-constitution-marketplace
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the llm-constitution plugin.

plugins.name: llm-constitution
plugins.description: An operating constitution for AI coding agents. Supreme layer: the Ten Base Laws — invariant-grounded, precedence-ordered, model-agnostic. Below it: dispatch discipline, never-self-verify acceptance, escalation ladders, judgment rubrics, and a perishable bindings layer.
